sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105886" key="tumboxo/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμβο-χόη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the throwing up a cairn</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barrow,</tr_> ibid. (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τυμβοχοῆσ᾽,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> foreg.).</sense> </entryFree>
